name: gofmt-fix
description: Check and fix Go source formatting with gofmt -l (list unformatted files) then optional gofmt -w (fix in place).

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more .go files or directories to check; default runs gofmt -l . on the working directory

parameters.name: --fix, -w
parameters.description: Fix unformatted files in place with gofmt -w after listing them

parameters.name: -C, --dir
parameters.description: Working directory to run gofmt in

examples.expected:
batch.go
db.go
---
2 file(s) need formatting
Formatted 2 file(s)

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses the two-step gofmt -l (check) + gofmt -w (fix) pattern into one step, saving 1 agent step per formatting cycle.
